B

backfillProductDetailPid(HstRequest, String) - Method in class org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.AbstractDiscoveryComponent
When the PDP component has not yet run (consumer-before-producer or PPR mode), locates the DiscoveryProductDetailComponent config from the page tree and extracts the PID via two-stage resolution: Document picker path → bean → productId field URL param name stored in component config (default: "pid") Returns Optional.empty() when no matching producer is found on the page or when no PID can be resolved.
backfillSearchResponse(HstRequest, String) - Method in class org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.AbstractDiscoveryComponent
When the request cache is empty (consumer ran before producer, or PPR mode), locates the producer's component config from the page tree, re-runs the API call with its stored parameters, and populates the cache so subsequent components get a cache hit.
